subject: Dyson counter state sync
fact: BvxEngine now exposes refreshDysonCountersFromWorld() to resync cached Dyson counters from the voxel world snapshot, and SystemRunner re-reads store state before MovementSystem so same-frame energy mutations affect movement speed.
reason: Future changes touching world metrics or frame ordering need to preserve the counter-resync path and avoid stale store snapshots across throttled systems.
